overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in a distinctive red coat walking through a modern downtown city at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks, passes ground steam vents, and crosses an intersection with light vehicle traffic and scattered pedestrians amidst illuminated glass office towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with modern office buildings and steam vents

events.description: character walks past steam rising from ground vents near the curb

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated modern buildings and street trees

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the road to the left of the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall curved office building with illuminated windows and glass facade
ground-level vent emitting white steam onto the sidewalk
trees with autumn-colored foliage lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet urban sidewalk at night, passing modern glass office towers with illuminated windows. Steam rises from ground vents as the character moves forward, and a black sedan drives past on the adjacent road. Street trees with autumn foliage line the path.

events.description: pedestrian density increases as character approaches a group on the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the open promenade passing other pedestrians and approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the character on the promenade

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider waterfront promenade with paved tiles and a metal railing on the right. The character encounters more pedestrians walking in the opposite direction as the steam vents fall behind. Modern buildings remain visible in the distance while the path leads toward an upcoming intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street
red SUV drives past the character in the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk while navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red SUV driving through the intersection as the character crosses
pedestrian walking alongside the character in the crosswalk

entered.detail: white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street. A red SUV drives past on the left as the character navigates the crossing. The waterfront railing disappears from view as the character turns slightly to cross, with the modern glass building now directly ahead and traffic lights visible at the corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy downtown district that shifts from a narrow, steam-filled sidewalk to an open waterfront intersection. It begins with the character walking past illuminated glass office towers and autumn trees, as steam rises from ground vents and a black sedan passes on the adjacent road. As the character moves forward, the environment opens into a wider waterfront promenade with paved tiles and a metal railing, where the steam vents fade and more pedestrians appear. The scene then shifts as the character reaches a crosswalk and steps into the street, passing a red SUV on the left. Finally, the waterfront railing disappears from view as the camera turns toward a modern glass building and traffic lights at the corner.
